title: build,commit: add --sbom to scan and produce SBOMs when committing
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind feature

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Add a --sbom flag to `buildah build` and `buildah commit` which will scan the rootfs and specified context directories to build SPDX or CycloneDX SBOMs and lists of package URLs.

#### How to verify it

New integration tests!
Some more unit tests!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
The `buildah commit` and `buildah build` commands now recognize `--sbom` and related flags, which can be used to scan the image which is being created.  The scanner's output can be added to the image or saved to local disk.
```

comments.body:
> Not a detailed review yet but i have a small question.
> 
>     * Is it mandatory to merge the behavior of `--pull` and `--sbom`, i mean if there is a use-case when user wants to pull new scanner images but keep using his older base images he cannot do that as of now. Will it be a good idea to have `--sbom-scanner-pull` or just `--sbom-pull` instead ?

Maybe?  I don't know that there's a compelling case for having them be differently controllable, but we're already adding _eight_ flags to `build`, which had more flags than I'd like even before this PR.
 
>     * Documentation: `--pull` in `buildah-commit` docs talks about `sbom` while `--pull` in `buildah-build` says nothing about `sbom` .

Modified, hopefully acceptably.
Is this big enough to warrant a Buildah v2.0 to go out with Podman v5.0?  I don't think so, but there may be a case for it.

> Is this big enough to warrant a Buildah v2.0 to go out with Podman v5.0?

It does not.

> > Not a detailed review yet but i have a small question.
> > ```
> > * Is it mandatory to merge the behavior of `--pull` and `--sbom`, i mean if there is a use-case when user wants to pull new scanner images but keep using his older base images he cannot do that as of now. Will it be a good idea to have `--sbom-scanner-pull` or just `--sbom-pull` instead ?
> > ```
> 
> Maybe? I don't know that there's a compelling case for having them be differently controllable, but we're already adding _eight_ flags to `build`, which had more flags than I'd like even before this PR.
> 

Don't see any request or use-case for it, just saw it while reviewing, maybe we can do it later when actual request shows up.

LGTM
